creator: billblake2018@gmail.com
text:
If you want what's in /var/log/messages, I can cut and paste.

But here's a data point:  After reading another bug report that suggested that the band matters, I told my phone's hotspot to use 2.4GHz.  And the connection from my laptop to my phone came up as it should.  Then I returned the setting to allow 5GHz.  And the connection again worked at 5GHz.  Which, of course, means that I cannot now reproduce the bug. :)  (Well, at least until it next shows up.)
